name: example-watermark
title: Watermark (example)
author: Diffucore UI
description: A minimal example extension. Stamps the seed into the bottom-right corner of every generated image, adds an Extensions settings panel, and adds a tab that calls its own API endpoint. Read extension.py and web/example.js alongside docs/EXTENSIONS.md to see how every piece wires up. Ships disabled by default — enable it in Settings → Extensions to try it.
